top_signals.title: U.S. and Iran clash, putting fragile deal under growing strain
top_signals.summary: Each of the warring sides has accused the other of violating the agreement reached two weeks ago to end the 4-month-old conflict.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tokenization firm Securitize eyes early July NYSE debut with $400 million SPAC deal
top_signals.summary: Seeking to debut next week, Securitize will receive roughly $400 million after retaining more than 70% of its SPAC trust.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
